meaning: n.工作,操作;Op 乐曲 (opus);Observation Post,观察所;Opposed,对置发动机;操作员(=Operater)
examples: I'm going in for my op on Monday.
He always shopped at the co-op.
The co-op sells the art work at exhibitions.
Particularly lucky guests might even get to hop inside a 1950s aeroplane or helicopter for a photo op.
